feat_gal_asi.name: Galitarko Ability Score Increase
feat_gal_asi.description: Choose to increase one score by 2 and another by 1, or three different scores by 1. Your Strength maximum is 22.

feat_gal_claws.name: Claws
feat_gal_claws.description: Your claws are natural weapons. You deal 1d6 + Strength modifier slashing damage.

feat_gal_mauling_strike.name: Mauling Strike
feat_gal_mauling_strike.description: Immediately after you move at least 6 meters, you can make one melee attack with your claws as a bonus action.

feat_gal_bearable.name: Bearable
feat_gal_bearable.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

feat_pan_climber.name: High Climber (Panda)
feat_pan_climber.description: You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

feat_pan_bearfriend.name: Bearfriend
feat_pan_bearfriend.description: You have advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks.

feat_pan_rollup.name: Roll-Up
feat_pan_rollup.description: If not in heavy armor, you are pushed 1.5m instead of being knocked prone. Standing up only costs 1.5m of movement.

feat_pol_swim.name: Freezing Waters
feat_pol_swim.description: You have a swim speed equal to your walking speed.

feat_pol_keen_sight.name: Keen Sight
feat_pol_keen_sight.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

feat_pol_bearly_ready.name: Bearly Ready
feat_pol_bearly_ready.description: When rolling initiative, grant advantage to an ally within 9m while granting disadvantage to yourself.

feat_griz_keen_smell.name: Keen Smell
feat_griz_keen_smell.description: You have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

feat_griz_bearware.name: Bearware
feat_griz_bearware.description: It takes an additional creature for you to be flanked or affected by pack tactics.

races.name: Galitarko
races.description: A resolute people ruled by philosophy, resembling powerful bears.

subraces.name: Panda Galitarko
subraces.description: Selfless followers of the Iendu philosophy.

subraces.name: Polar Galitarko
subraces.description: Nomadic followers of the Stengul philosophy.

subraces.name: Grizzly Galitarko
subraces.description: Brutish in appearance, but followers of the Lendo philosophy.
